---
title: "UAV Application in Science"
id: module-goals
order: 40
summary: "Build an overview of UAV research approaches, primary literature, and personal assessment of relevant application areas."
modules:
  - module-introduction
materials:
  - material-1
  - material-2
  - material-hs-1
  - material-hs-5
  - material-hs-0
  - material-hs-2
activities: []
assessments:
  - assessment
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/introduction/module-goals.md"
---

This introduction is intended to serve three main purposes:

- To get a first overview of the research approaches and projects in the broadest sense of applied environmental science.
- To integrate the reading and reception of primary literature, including studies, reviews, and other compilations, into the research process.
- To learn to compare the evaluation of what has been read with one's own assessment, creating the basis for valid procedures.

## Connected Module

- [UAV based remote Sensing - A Brief Overview](../modules/module-introduction.qmd)
